title: Looking for Category Manager at GKB Opticals

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at GKB Opticals
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a Category Manager in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!
